item.title: Trump wants to kill you and your kids in a pointless oil war. Did you see where he's paying a company a billion dollars to NOT build alternative energy?

item.dc:creator: JamieSays

item.title: Trump: "Think of it – It's not just NATO. You know who else didn't help us? South Korea – Australia – Japan didn't help us. Kim Jong Un said very nice things about me. He used to call Joe Biden a mentally retarded person. – That helped us."

item.title: During a 2022 church restoration in Naples, Italy... a nearly 400yr old secret fresco of a dragon was discovered hidden behind a painting
item.description:
Depicting the battle between St. George and the legendary dragon The hinges were installed after it was discovered.
At the Church of Saint George Maggiore

21

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @adorkastock posted this really cool pose. Love her and what she does.
27 Man Tax: JK Simmons
“A common mistake that people make when trying to design something completely foolproof is to underestimate the ingenuity of complete fools.” - Douglas Adams, Mostly Harmless So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: This is how you deal with war crimes
item.description: For those not aware, the Victoria Cross is the highest military award for bravery that can be given in the Commonwealth countries. The arrest of a VC recipient for war crimes is an extraordinary development. https://www.abc.net.au/news/2026-04-07/ben-roberts-smith-war-crimes-allegations-arrest/106537668

item.title: James Potter is...what kind of wizard? A grand one?
item.description: Haven't been paying much attention to the new Harry Potter cash grab/"Rowling trying to make people like her" project. If I see it at all, it'll be through pirating it. But came across this on my YouTube shorts feed and it was pretty funny. I mean, did they not consider the ramifications of making Snape black? Credit to TheMythologyGuy. https://www.youtube.com/shorts/RrNzlsny3eo
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: Al Jazeera confirms the Trump administration's near total fuel blockade on Cuba is causing infant mortality to surge. Doctors are literally operating blind in the dark as life saving machines shut off. This is a deliberate crime against humanity.
item.dc:creator: jee22

item.title: GovBrief Today #431
item.description: Donald Trump gave Iran until 8 PM Tuesday to reopen the Strait of Hormuz or he will destroy its bridges and power plants, and when asked if he was concerned about 93 million civilians losing electricity, he said no, they want us to do it. That is a war crime threat from a president whose war has dragged on beyond the four weeks he promised. As Trump threatens to violate the rules of war abroad, his administration keeps ignoring courts and laws at home. A judge ruled in March that Kennedy's hand-picked vaccine advisors were "distinctly unqualified" under the CDC panel's own charter. Kennedy's response was to rewrite the charter. In Florida, wildlife police have been conducting warrantless surveillance across thousands of cameras on behalf of ICE. This administration has been defying the rules since day one. Now it is preparing to shatter the Geneva Conventions by tomorrow night. Call your representatives through Resistbot and 5 Calls and demand they use the power the Constitution gives them to stop this president before the bombs fall. We've emailed 6,900+ stories over 431 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Today on the Website (embedded links, data, image): https://go.govbrief.today/260406-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/data-center-shooting [2] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-asean-allies [3] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr06 [4] https://go.govbrief.today/rfk-panel-charter [5] https://go.govbrief.today/artemis-record [6] https://go.govbrief.today/bee-lab [7] https://go.govbrief.today/briefing-canceled [8] https://go.govbrief.today/raskin-flynn-settlement [9] https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-bannon [10] https://go.govbrief.today/fla-wildlife-police [11] https://go.govbrief.today/airport-sanctuary [12] https://go.govbrief.today/trans-student-protections [13] https://go.govbrief.today/gonalez-second [14] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-tarlov [15] https://go.govbrief.today/reporter-threat [16] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-shooting-video Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: All I want to do is enjoy my time
item.description: Now im in bed, getting stoned, eating macaroni salad, and catching up on sleep. In bed bedore 8 pm, im happily getting old. If I wake up to an obituary tomorrow I'd be so happy

item.title: Twitchy McTwitcherson
item.description:
@IsAHotdogASandwich has come to the kitten room to meet the babies!! Second Imgurian in a week to come to my house. And neither of them are serial killers, so yay! Jaime has fallen asleep in her arms and is twitching up a storm! Little brother Jorge is coming over to snuggle
They’re used to being in a cuddle puddle so they’re more comfy sleeping on top of each other. What is Jaime dreaming about??
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Deers are enjoying the cherry blossom in Nara Park in Japan.
item.dc:creator: Bombaso

item.title: Day 15 Weigh-In
item.description:
I had a little help with the weigh-in tonight, in the form of Imgurian @IsAHotdogASandwich. She fell hard for Number Six Jorge
Little sleeping Jorge fits right in the palm of her hand!!
Ok, Number One Jaime is up 18 grams! Officially the second biggest!
Number Two Adilene is up 12 grams! That’s great for her!
Number Three Alis is really starting to piss me off haha. I came home at lunch to feed mama and weighed Alis just to see, and she was at 224 grams. And now she’s down to 218. I see syringe feeding in her future
Chunky Monkey Number Four Ever is still the biggest, with a gain of 20 solid grams!!
Number Five Josefina is only up three grams. Syringe feeding for her, too
And Number Six Jorge will be our third syringe-feeder as he only gained five grams.
@runesky
Thanks for helping out, @IsAHotdogASandwich! Time to get some formula ready.
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: How syringe feeding went
item.description:
Number Three Alis did pretty well! Ate 5 whole cc’s! And didn’t scream at me haha
Number Five Josefina drank 6 cc’s! Gotta clean her up
Look at her big fat belly!
Number Six Jorge sucked down 7 cc’s!
He’s a wiggle worm but he has a fat belly, too. Alis’s belly is a little round, so I’ll take that. Mama Bobbie loves the formula so she gets the bit the kittens don’t eat. And she loves licking their little faces clean. Now it’s time to spend time with mama Bobbie. She deserves as much attention as her babies get
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays
